query:
UPDATE users SET role = 'admin' WHERE email IN ('wascar.ortiz0410@gmail.com', 'yisvel10@gmail.com');
UPDATE users SET role = 'driver' WHERE email NOT IN ('wascar.ortiz0410@gmail.com', 'yisvel10@gmail.com') AND role != 'admin';
command:
